heading: Aggravation
label: 1153 Aggravation
text: A preexisting injury or disease will be considered to have been aggravated by active military, naval, air, or space service, where there is an increase in disability during such service, unless there is a specific finding that the increase in disability is due to the natural progress of the disease.
notes: Amendments2021— substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–2831991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 353 of this title
amendments: Amendments2021— substituted “air, or space service” for “or air service”.Pub. L. 116–2831991— renumbered as this section.Pub. L. 102–83section 353 of this title
